variant: 4 gauge models for different lift capacities
capacity: Varies by gauge model - 7,000 to 30,000 lbs

specifications.address: P.O. Box 110, 65 Vrooman Ave, Amsterdam, NY 12010

features: Visually verifies lift has been lowered onto mechanical locks
Diagnoses driveability, mileage and handling issues if vehicle is overweight
Visual show and tell for customers when to install heavier duty shocks, better brakes or heavier ply tires
Simple to install - just screws into hydraulic fitting
Raise the vehicle and the weight is clearly displayed
Available for both 2-post lifts and mobile column lifts
safety_features: Confirms balanced load from side to side on mobile lifts
Balanced load means extended tire life
Balanced load equals a safer truck
Balanced load means lower chance of rollover
Visually verifies lift has been lowered onto mechanical locks
notes: Weight Gauge on Mobile Lifts can confirm balanced load from side to side
Available under discounted government contract in all 50 states
Gauge scale markings visible in images show increments of 1000 lbs
